author: doll-agent
content: Fix decreasing-bins branch in digitize: replace broken rev-position-subtract logic with direct count of bins strictly-above (right=false) or at-or-above (right=true). Add 4 tests: canonical [0.5,1.5,2.5] vs [3,2,1] -> [3,2,1], value-above-max -> 0, value-below-min -> bin_count, right=true bin-edge values.
